calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Vacated

Order To Show Cause Hearing Regarding Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on Friday, October 25, 2013:
Maria M. Lampasona, Esq. of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP [510.433.2600] appearing for Defendants HERTZ VEHICLES LLC and BILLY SNEED, JR.;
No appearance by or on behalf of the Plaintiff.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Order To Show Cause Hearing Regarding Dismissal. Tentative ruling: Granted, no opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Compel Pltf'S Deposition, Monetary Sanctions And Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on TUE-OCT-08-2013:
John W. Ranucci, Esq. of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP [510.433.2600] appearing for defendants HERTZ VEHICLES LLC and BILLY SNEED;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re: Defendants HERTZ VEHICLES LLC'S and BILLY SNEED'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition, Monetary Sanctions And Terminating Sanctions.
IT APPEARS THAT NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED; THEREFORE DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDER TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. IF HE FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER DEFENDANTS MAY MOVE TO HAVE HIS ACTION DISMISSED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,045.00 ARE ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF. The Court further sets an Order to Show Cause hearing re Dismissal for October 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. MITCHELL A. CARP, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF BENITO MENDOZA IS
Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served by mail on April 10, 2013. Moving party only provided 14 court days notice. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
